name: Integra de geminis
description:
“I will watch the flow... I will not go against the current. I will be like the wind, like water... Look. There is no fate that cannot be controlled... Look! If fate is just something that binds people... If that is the decree of the stars, then I will destroy them all! Listen to the melody of the stars being destroyed! Galaxian Explosion!”

#Saint Seiya #Saint Seiya Omega
creator: Xendor
